Dashboard.pleaseEnsure: Please ensure the gateway server is running on port 3000.

Portal.title: Employee Portal
Portal.emptyState: Hello! I am your Enterprise AI Assistant. I can help with code reviews, summarizing documents, data analysis, and general Q&A. All queries run through the secure Gateway with automatic compliance filters.

Settings.title: Platform Settings
Settings.description: Configure global preferences and default behaviors.
Settings.modelDesc: Users can still override this selection inside the Employee Portal.

Admin.dashboardDesc: Live telemetry sync from the API gateway core.
Admin.usersDesc: Manage access controls, roles, and API keys.
Admin.orgsDesc: Manage tenant workspaces and billing plans.
Admin.monitorDesc: Real-time HTTP/SSE stream of gateway chat and API traffic.
Admin.providersDesc: Configure weights, toggle endpoints, and inspect capabilities.
Admin.routingDesc: Visualize global router pathfinding and set global optimization weight strategies.
Admin.policiesDesc: Configure automated compliance, cost capping, and model downgrade rules.
Admin.cacheDesc: Monitor Redis-backed semantic query performance and efficiency savings.
Admin.costsDesc: Track LLM expenses, token consumption, and financial optimizations.
Admin.securityDesc: Audit log of Prompt Injection attempts, Vietnamese PII detections, and policy shields.
Admin.logsDesc: Structured auditing, system tracing, and transaction outputs.
Admin.docsDesc: Access Swagger UI logs, system-wide schemas, and release architectures.

Routing.balancedDesc: Weights health, latency, and cost variables evenly.
Routing.latencyDesc: Routes to fastest response times (OpenAI Cloud).
Routing.haDesc: Aggressively avoids failing endpoints using circuit breakers.
Routing.clickToInspect: Click on any pipeline node to inspect execution logic details.
Routing.scanDetails: Scanning input for script tags and injection patterns.
Routing.piiDetails: Vietnamese regex CCCD/phone checker executed. 0 leaks blocked.
Routing.policyDetails: Active rules matched. Evaluating strategies against: {strategy}.
Routing.routerDetailsOpenai: Selected OpenAI gpt-4o based on {strategy} strategy.
Routing.routerDetailsOllama: Selected Ollama local model based on {strategy} strategy.
